title: Vans x truth | Kevin Lyons
summary: truth x Vans teamed up with world-renowned artist Kevin Lyons to create a limited-edition sneaker covered in his iconic monsters, each one shouting a message about ending smoking for good.
body: TRUTH X VANS HAVE STEPPED UP ONCE AGAIN TO CREATE A LIMITED EDITION SHOE THAT'S GOT AS MUCH TO SAY AS TEENS DO. TEAMED UP WITH WORLD RENOWNED ARTIST KEVIN LYONS TO CREATE, NOT JUST ANY OLD SNEAKER BUT A PIECE OF ART TEENS COULD WEAR. THESE KICKS ARE COVERED WITH KEVIN'S ICONIC MONSTERS SHOUTING POWERFUL MESSAGES ABOUT ENDING SMOKING FOR GOOD.
IT ALL STARTED WITH A MURAL IN THE HEART OF TOBACCO COUNTRY RALEIGH, NC
KEVIN TOOK LIVE REQUESTS FROM HIS INSTAGRAM FOLLOWERS TO BE INCLUDED IN THE MURAL
WE THEN TOOK THE DESIGN FROM THE WALL AND PUT IT ON THE SHOES
